'''nokafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:staged|staged]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:staged|staged]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nokafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokafithi|nokafithi]] || [[word:nokafiji|nokafiji]] || [[word:nokafishi|nokafishi]] || [[word:nokafiki|nokafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokafuthuthu|nokafuthuthu]] || [[word:nokafujuju|nokafujuju]] || [[word:nokafushushu|nokafushushu]] || [[word:nokafukuku|nokafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokafuthu|nokafuthu]] || [[word:nokafuju|nokafuju]] || [[word:nokafushu|nokafushu]] || [[word:nokafuku|nokafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokafufthuf|nokafufthuf]] || [[word:nokafufjuf|nokafufjuf]] || [[word:nokafufshuf|nokafufshuf]] || [[word:nokafufkuf|nokafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokafethe|nokafethe]] || [[word:nokafeje|nokafeje]] || [[word:nokafeshe|nokafeshe]] || [[word:nokafeke|nokafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokafothotho|nokafothotho]] || [[word:nokafojojo|nokafojojo]] || [[word:nokafoshosho|nokafoshosho]] || [[word:nokafokoko|nokafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokafotho|nokafotho]] || [[word:nokafojo|nokafojo]] || [[word:nokafosho|nokafosho]] || [[word:nokafoko|nokafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokafofthof|nokafofthof]] || [[word:nokafofjof|nokafofjof]] || [[word:nokafofshof|nokafofshof]] || [[word:nokafofkof|nokafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfthÃŸf|nokafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfjÃŸf|nokafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfshÃŸf|nokafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfkÃŸf|nokafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nokafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nokafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nokafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nokafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfthÃŸf|nokafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfjÃŸf|nokafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfshÃŸf|nokafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfkÃŸf|nokafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfthÃŸf|nokafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfjÃŸf|nokafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfshÃŸf|nokafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nokafÃŸfkÃŸf|nokafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nokafÃḊthÃḊ|nokafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nokafÃḊjÃḊ|nokafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nokafÃḊshÃḊ|nokafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nokafÃḊkÃḊ|nokafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nokafathatha|nokafathatha]] || [[word:nokafajaja|nokafajaja]] || [[word:nokafashasha|nokafashasha]] || [[word:nokafakaka|nokafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nokafatha|nokafatha]] || [[word:nokafaja|nokafaja]] || [[word:nokafasha|nokafasha]] || [[word:nokafaka|nokafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nokafafthaf|nokafafthaf]] || [[word:nokafafjaf|nokafafjaf]] || [[word:nokafafshaf|nokafafshaf]] || [[word:nokafafkaf|nokafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nokafasha|nokafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nokafshÃḋsha|nokafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nokafrosha|nokafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nokafmusha|nokafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nokafyasha|nokafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonokafnkshÃḋsha|gonokafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonokafnkrosha|gonokafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonokafnkmusha|gonokafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonokafnkyasha|gonokafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nokakafasha|nokakafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nokakafshÃḋsha|nokakafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nokakafrosha|nokakafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nokakafmusha|nokakafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nokakafyasha|nokakafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonokakafnkshÃḋsha|gonokakafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonokakafnkrosha|gonokakafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonokakafnkmusha|gonokakafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonokakafnkyasha|gonokakafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nekÃḊfasha|nekÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nekÃḊfshÃḋsha|nekÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nekÃḊfrosha|nekÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nekÃḊfmusha|nekÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nekÃḊfyasha|nekÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonekÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gonekÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonekÃḊfnkrosha|gonekÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonekÃḊfnkmusha|gonekÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonekÃḊfnkyasha|gonekÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nokfafasha|nokfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nokfafshÃḋsha|nokfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nokfafrosha|nokfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nokfafmusha|nokfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nokfafyasha|nokfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonokfafnkshÃḋsha|gonokfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonokfafnkrosha|gonokfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonokfafnkmusha|gonokfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonokfafnkyasha|gonokfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
